item.title: They Denied Baby Dylan Groves The Life He Deserved
item.description: An examination of the circumstances that prevented Dylan Groves from receiving the care and opportunities he needed, told with respect and clarity.

media:content.media:title: They Denied Baby Dylan Groves The Life He Deserved
media:content.media:description: An examination of the circumstances that prevented Dylan Groves from receiving the care and opportunities he needed, told with respect and clarity.

item.title: Matthew Milat: The Boy With Infamy In His DNA
item.description: An overview of Matthew Milat, examining his background, criminal actions, and the factors that have contributed to his infamy, presented factually and respectfully.

media:content.media:title: Matthew Milat: The Boy With Infamy In His DNA
media:content.media:description: An overview of Matthew Milat, examining his background, criminal actions, and the factors that have contributed to his infamy, presented factually and respectfully.

item.title: The Movie "True Story" Was Based On A True Story!
item.description: A look at how the film True Story drew inspiration from real events, exploring the facts behind the story and how they were adapted for the screen.

media:content.media:title: The Movie "True Story" Was Based On A True Story!
media:content.media:description: A look at how the film True Story drew inspiration from real events, exploring the facts behind the story and how they were adapted for the screen.
